  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_HDCP_SUPPORT = 0x20000000, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_ID = 0x40000000, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_CODE = 0x40000001, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_PROTECT = 0x40000002,
